name: FULLER H B CO
summary: PART I H.B. Fuller Company was founded in 1887 and incorporated as a Minnesota corporation in 1915. Our stock is traded on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol FUL. As used herein, H.B. Fuller,we,"us,our,management or company includes H.B. Fuller and its subsidiaries unless otherwise indicated.
